name_en: Les Halles – Covered Market of Tours

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the charcuterie stalls are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les stands de charcuterie ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay STAHN duh shar-koo-tuh-REE
phrases.cultural_note: Les Halles de Tours is one of the finest covered markets in the Loire Valley. Touraine rillettes — slow-cooked pork spread — are a must-try regional speciality.

responses.english: At the back of the market, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN doo mar-SHAY soor lah DRWAHT
responses.local: Au fond du marché, sur la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they sell rillettes de Tours
phrases.cultural_note: Rillettes de Tours (chunky, lightly spiced pork rillettes) differ from the smoother rillettes du Mans. They have IGP (protected geographical indication) status.

responses.english: Yes, at the charcutier over there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the market closes
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme le marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR FAIRM luh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Les Halles de Tours is open Tuesday through Sunday mornings. It closes at lunchtime, so visit early for the best selection.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find fresh Loire Valley mushrooms
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver des champignons de la région ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY day shahm-peen-YON duh lah ray-ZHYON
phrases.cultural_note: The Loire Valley is the largest mushroom-growing region in France. Button mushrooms (champignons de Paris), shiitake, and oyster mushrooms are cultivated in the region's tuffeau caves.

responses.english: At the greengrocer, in the middle of the market.
responses.phonetic: shay luh mah-ray-SHAY oh mee-LYUH doo mar-SHAY
responses.local: Chez le maraîcher, au milieu du marché.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a vendor about the seasonal fruit
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les fruits de saison en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay FRWEE duh say-ZOHN ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Loire Valley produces excellent pears (Poire de Tours), plums, and strawberries. Seasonal availability changes each month.

responses.english: The strawberries are excellent right now.
responses.phonetic: lay FREZ sohn tek-say-LAHNT ahn suh moh-MAHN
responses.local: Les fraises sont excellentes en ce moment.
